meanings.definition: order by virtue of superior authority; decree
examples: The King ordained the persecution and expulsion of the Jews
the legislature enacted this law in 1985
he was ordained in the Church

meanings.definition: invest with ministerial or priestly authority
examples: The minister was ordained only last month

meanings.definition: fixed or established especially by order or command; )
examples: at the time appointed (or the appointed time

meanings.definition: invested with ministerial or priestly functions
